narration: Here's what science actually says about oncogenes.

narration: Oncogenes are mutated versions of normal genes that can lead to cancer.
visual_description: Context visual: Oncogenes are mutated versions of normal genes that can lead to cancer.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Oncogenes are mutated versions of normal genes that can lead to cancer.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Oncogenes are mutated versions of normal genes that can lead to cancer.

narration: But how do they actually cause cells to go rogue?

ai_image_prompt: Retention Hook visual: But how do they actually cause cells to go rogue?
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Retention Hook visual: But how do they actually cause cells to go rogue?

narration: They can promote uncontrolled cell division and inhibit normal cell death.

ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: They can promote uncontrolled cell division and inhibit normal cell death.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: They can promote uncontrolled cell division and inhibit normal cell death.
